controls.abstention_policy: Gan 6-month seizure-free threshold; use no seizure frequency reference only when no seizure frequency information is present

hypothesis: LabeledFewShot with four synthesis-labeled demonstrations on the direct Gan S0 path establishes the minimum-demo baseline for the few-shot optimizer ladder without bootstrap search cost.
metric_caveats: Monthly-frequency, Purist category, and Pragmatic category metrics are benchmark-facing.
Raw exact, normalized-label exact, schema validity, abstention, and evidence support are diagnostic.
LabeledFewShot samples labeled demos from the development trainset and does not bootstrap teacher traces.
This capped validation config compares optimizers on the direct single-pass path; it is not published Gan benchmark reproduction.
